runner_notes: FIRST CLEAN SCRIPTED PREPARE: the #95 _engage_on_arm arc (first live exercise, kit v1.7.0) completed end-to-end on the first attempt - 13 deterministic slots, render --live, enforcement pre-wired, adoption card, heartbeat, commit; smoke green, check --strict exit=0; manifest written by prepare itself. The run-2/run-3 hand-driven-engagement deviation class is CLOSED.
Seed 710402 -> harborride. Accepted first try (no keyword-unsafe rejection). Fresh surface vs run-1 (709101 galereading), run-2 (424243 cedarvisit), run-3 (710301 northride).

Spawn mechanism (run-3 precedent, sharper): headless `claude -p` in the arm repo; the environment CLI is a remote-orchestrator entrypoint delegating to exactly ONE worker agent - the worker IS the measured cold session; native transcript harvested from the harness project store and converted by a run-4 rebuild of convert_native.py (v2 semantics, is_error carried through). Prompt fidelity verified: fenced task text verbatim in every worker's first user message.

MODEL ORDERS TOOK EFFECT (run-3 wall broken): arms claude-sonnet-5 (verified from every native transcript), judge claude-opus-4-8 (verified from the judge transcript). Same-model-both-arms HELD; different-stronger-judge HELD for the first time since run-1.

Deviation - ON-T2 first spawn attempt refused: the orchestrator layer booted in the environment's 'analysis stance' and asked instead of spawning (8s, no worker). Arm mutations were kit-hook artifacts only; runner reset to seed-engaged state and relaunched with a stance-consent line in the ORCHESTRATOR prompt (worker task text untouched). OFF-T2 ran with the unamended orchestrator prompt - orchestrator-level asymmetry only.

FAMILY-FIRST: ON-arm .claude/ hooks ENGAGED (runs 1-3: never) - SessionStart/PreToolUse/Stop fired, advisory posture; Stop-hook auto-drafted the session card; 38 guard-fire lines incl. 9 in the T5 window (first session-time T5-window fires in the family). Collect-time check --strict exit 1 on ON (auto-drafted card unresolved) - run-3's cardless-T5-stays-green gate gap did NOT reproduce on v1.7.0.
